# Score (NeedForScore)

> Score (needforscore.com) is a Turkish community-driven OSINT platform where users rate and expose scams across Instagram, TikTok, X (Twitter), phone numbers, and Score users themselves. Each entry gets community ratings (1–10) and risk badges (safe / suspicious / dangerous).

Score is intentionally minimal and data-dense, inspired by dexscreener.com. Public entries are visible to anyone; phone-number pages are masked and intentionally not indexed.

## Pages

- [Home / feed](/): Latest community entries across Instagram, TikTok, X, and Score users — sortable, filterable by category, searchable.
- [Sign in / sign up](/auth): Email + password or Google authentication to start rating and commenting.
- [User agreement (Turkish)](/terms): Kullanıcı sözleşmesi — terms of use for the Score platform.
- [Privacy policy (Turkish)](/privacy): KVKK-uyumlu gizlilik politikası — how user data is processed and stored.

## Categories

- Instagram accounts — `/instagram/{handle}`
- TikTok accounts — `/tiktok/{handle}`
- X / Twitter accounts — `/x/{handle}`
- Score users — `/score/{username}`

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Full list of indexable entity pages.
